_comment: This file maps your internal product IDs to their respective market source URLs (e.g. Allkeyshop) and sets individual markup margins. The update-prices.js script uses this to fetch the latest prices.

products.name: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate - 1 Month
products.description: Play hundreds of high-quality games on console, PC, and cloud. Includes EA Play.

products.name: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate - 3 Months
products.description: 3 months of Ultimate access. Play day one releases and enjoy multiplayer.

products.name: Xbox Game Pass Core - 12 Months
products.description: Formerly Xbox Live Gold. Online console multiplayer and catalog of 25+ games.

products.name: Xbox Gift Card 10 EUR
products.description: Add funds to your Microsoft account. Buy games, add-ons, and more.

products.name: Xbox Gift Card 20 EUR
products.description: Add funds to your Microsoft account. Buy games, add-ons, and more.

products.name: Xbox Gift Card 50 EUR
products.description: Perfect for buying full-priced games or expanding your library.

products.name: EA Sports FC 25 (Xbox One & Series X|S)
products.description: Experience the most true-to-life football experience ever.

products.name: Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 (Cross-Gen)
products.description: The signature Black Ops series returns with an epic campaign and multiplayer.

products.name: Forza Horizon 5 Standard Edition
products.description: Explore the vibrant and ever-evolving open world landscapes of Mexico.

products.name: Grand Theft Auto V Premium Edition
products.description: Includes GTA V Story Mode and Grand Theft Auto Online.

products.name: Minecraft (Xbox)
products.description: Explore randomly generated worlds and build amazing things.

products.name: Cyberpunk 2077
products.description: An open-world, action-adventure RPG set in the dark future of Night City.
